aboutPage.title: ABOUT
aboutPage.subtitle: US
aboutPage.description: Learn about our mission, vision, and values.
aboutPage.heroSubtext: Future game recharge experience · Secure · Fast · Reliable
aboutPage.missionDescription: Our mission is to provide global players with secure, fast, and reliable game recharge services, so every player can enjoy a seamless experience without regional or payment barriers.
aboutPage.visionDescription: To become a leading global game service platform through innovation and excellent service, connecting players everywhere and creating limitless game experiences.

values.secureDescription: We always put user safety first and protect every transaction with advanced security technology.
values.fastDescription: Millisecond-level recharge processing keeps your game experience uninterrupted.
values.userDescription: We focus on user needs and deliver thoughtful service with personalized experiences.

cta.description: Join our gaming community and enjoy secure, fast, and reliable game recharge services.
